---
title: "Talks"
---



- May 2024 -- **Is EEG better left alone for decoding?** -- Psychologie und Gehirn (PuG), Hamburg

- June 2023 -- **Visual and auditory population coding for quantity in human cortices** -- Psychologie und Gehirn (PuG), Tübingen

- March 2021 -- **Fingerprints, forever young?** -- German Teletrust Biometric Working Group, European Association for Biometrics

- March 2020 -- **A bilateral model of congenital prosopagnosia – connectivity between FFA and ATL** -- 2nd Symposium of the Arbeitsgemeinschaft für Neuropsychopharmakologie und Pharmakopsychiatrie (AGNP) und Deutsche Gesellschaft für Biologische Psychiatrie (DGNP)

- October 2017 -- **The watchdog won't stop barking. Reduced Amygdala Inhibition in Major Depression. Normalization via Medication, and the Impact of Genetic and Environmental Risk Factors.** -- World Congress of Psychiatry, WPA XVII, Berlin
